differential_diagnoses: Bone marrow failure syndrome (e.g., Aplastic anemia)
next_steps: Perform bone marrow aspiration and biopsy with flow cytometry and cytogenetics
Obtain flow cytometry for PNH (CD55/CD59 expression on neutrophils and monocytes)
Order laboratory evaluation: Reticulocyte count, haptoglobin, serum ferritin, vitamin B12, folate, copper, and zinc levels
Assess for HLH using the HScore or similar criteria (check fasting triglycerides, ferritin, and soluble IL-2 receptor)
Perform peripheral blood smear review by a hematopathologist
Consider dermatologic consultation for evaluation of hypopigmented skin lesions
Maintain strict hemodynamic monitoring and avoid empirical immunosuppression until malignancy or marrow failure is ruled out
